title: Brimstone
description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and ALL enemies gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic has a dual effect: the player gains 2 Strength each turn while all enemy opponents also gain 1 Strength. The net benefit depends on the number of enemies in combat.
